user.title: Connect to Ollama
user.description: Enter the base URL of your Ollama server. Home Assistant must be able to reach this address.

data_description.ollama_url: Examples: http://127.0.0.1:11434 (same machine), http://192.168.1.50:11434 (LAN), http://host.docker.internal:11434 (Ollama on host when HA runs in Docker).

agent.title: Configure Home Assistant Agent
agent.description: Choose a model from your Ollama server and set how the agent should behave.

data_description.model: Models are loaded from your Ollama server. Use an instruct model with reliable JSON output (e.g. qwen2.5:7b-instruct). Run `ollama pull <model>` first if a model is missing.
data_description.mission_statement: Describe how you want your home to behave. The agent uses this as its primary goal when acting autonomously.
data_description.poll_interval: How often the agent evaluates your home in the background.
data_description.entity_include: Optional glob patterns limiting which entities the agent may act on (e.g. light.*, climate.*). Ignored when admin mode is enabled.
data_description.entity_exclude: Optional glob patterns for entities the agent must never change.
data_description.admin_mode: When enabled, the agent can call any Home Assistant service and see all entities (except excludes). homeassistant.*, hassio.*, supervisor.*, and auth.* remain blocked.
data_description.resume_on_startup: When enabled, the agent resumes interrupted runs after Home Assistant restarts or power loss.
data_description.announce_releases: Notify and optionally announce when you upgrade the integration or when a newer version is available on GitHub.
data_description.ollama_keep_alive: How long Ollama keeps the model loaded in memory (e.g. 30m, 1h, -1). Longer values improve prompt cache hits between requests.
data_description.ollama_request_timeout: Maximum seconds to wait for Ollama to finish a chat request. Increase this for slow models or large context windows (default 600).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Home Assistant Agent
reconfigure.description: Update Ollama connection, model, and agent behavior.

data_description.ollama_url: Must be reachable from the Home Assistant host.
data_description.model: Models are loaded live from your Ollama server.
data_description.mission_statement: Describe how you want your home to behave.
data_description.poll_interval: How often the agent evaluates your home in the background.
data_description.entity_include: Optional glob patterns limiting which entities the agent may act on. Ignored when admin mode is enabled.
data_description.entity_exclude: Optional glob patterns for entities the agent must never change.
data_description.admin_mode: Allow any Home Assistant service except homeassistant.*, hassio.*, supervisor.*, and auth.*.
data_description.resume_on_startup: Resume interrupted runs after Home Assistant restarts or power loss.
data_description.announce_releases: Notify when you upgrade or when a newer version is available.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Ollama. Check the URL, firewall, and that Ollama is running (`ollama serve`).
error.model_not_found: The selected model is no longer available on the Ollama server.
error.no_models: Ollama is reachable but returned no models. Pull a model first, e.g. `ollama pull qwen2.5:7b-instruct`.

init.title: Home Assistant Agent settings
init.description: Update Ollama connection, model, and agent behavior.

data_description.ollama_url: Must be reachable from the Home Assistant host.
data_description.model: Pick from models currently installed on your Ollama server.
data_description.mission_statement: Describe how you want your home to behave.
data_description.poll_interval: How often the agent evaluates your home in the background.
data_description.entity_include: Optional glob patterns limiting which entities the agent may act on. Ignored when admin mode is enabled.
data_description.entity_exclude: Optional glob patterns for entities the agent must never change.
data_description.admin_mode: When enabled, the agent can call any Home Assistant service and see all entities (except excludes).
data_description.resume_on_startup: Resume interrupted agent runs after Home Assistant restarts.
data_description.announce_releases: Notify when you upgrade or when a newer version is available on GitHub.
data_description.ollama_keep_alive: How long Ollama keeps the model loaded (e.g. 30m, 1h, -1 for forever).
data_description.ollama_request_timeout: Maximum seconds to wait for Ollama responses (default 600).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Ollama. Check the URL, firewall, and that Ollama is running.
error.no_models: No models found on the Ollama server. Pull a model with `ollama pull` and try again.
error.model_not_found: The selected model is no longer available on the Ollama server.
